message:
test(bd-1078): add 22 unit tests for builder.rs

Cover console config, traffic logging, periodic stats, force color,
logging full config, list page size, resource templates, middleware,
auth provider, auto_mask_errors, duplicate behavior error, mount
variants (tools/resources/prompts/empty), proxy with catalog,
DEFAULT_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECS, mask_error_details toggling, and
strict_input_validation toggling. Server test count: 1042.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
